documentation.file_docstring: Strips dangling tool_use blocks from assistant messages when the immediately following user message does not contain a matching tool_result block. This fixes the "tool_use ids found without tool_result blocks" error from Anthropic.
inline_comments: Get the next message to check for tool_result blocks
If next message is not user, keep the assistant message as-is
Collect tool_use_ids from the next user message's tool_result blocks
Filter out tool_use blocks that don't have matching tool_result
Keep tool_use if its id is in the valid set
If all content would be removed, insert a minimal fallback text block
Validates and fixes conversation turn sequences for Gemini API. Gemini requires strict alternating user→assistant→tool→user pattern. Merges consecutive assistant messages together.

Validates and fixes conversation turn sequences for Anthropic API. Anthropic requires strict alternating user→assistant pattern. Merges consecutive user messages together. Also strips dangling tool_use blocks that lack corresponding tool_result blocks.
First, strip dangling tool_use blocks from assistant messages
